///<reference types="svelte" />
;
import { userStore } from "$lib/stores/user.svelte";
import { count } from "$lib/stores/counter.svelte";
function $$render() {
/*Ωignore_startΩ*/;let $userStore = __sveltets_2_store_get(userStore);;let $count = __sveltets_2_store_get(count);/*Ωignore_endΩ*/



let currentUser = $derived($userStore?.name ?? "Guest");
;
async () => {

 { svelteHTML.createElement("h1", {}); currentUser; }
 { svelteHTML.createElement("p", {});  $count; }
if($userStore){
	 { svelteHTML.createElement("button", { "onclick":() => ($userStore = null),});  }
}
};
return { props: {} as Record<string, never>, exports: {}, bindings: __sveltets_$$bindings(''), slots: {}, events: {} }}
const Stores__SvelteComponent_ = __sveltets_2_fn_component($$render());
/*Ωignore_startΩ*/type Stores__SvelteComponent_ = ReturnType<typeof Stores__SvelteComponent_>;
/*Ωignore_endΩ*/export default Stores__SvelteComponent_;
